Formerly: ENMA698Z.

ENMA688 Seminar in Materials Science and Engineering (1 Credit) Current research in materials science and engineering and related fields. Restriction: Must be in Engineering: Materials Science program. Repeatable to: 4 credits if content differs.

Formerly: ENMA697.

ENMA689 Special Topics in Engineering Materials (3 Credits) Restriction: Permission of instructor; and permission of ENGR-Materials Science & Engineering department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
